description_long: This is a modern rectangular desk featuring a light wood-grain finish on its surfaces and a sturdy black metal frame. The desk includes a single central drawer with a metallic handle, positioned beneath the main work surface, and an open shelf below the drawer for additional storage. The right side of the desk has a vertical panel that extends to the floor, providing structural support and a side hook for hanging items. The left side is more open, supported by a metal leg, giving the desk a balanced yet asymmetrical appearance. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for contemporary urban environments. The materials and construction suggest durability and ease of maintenance.
description: A modern, rectangular desk with a light wood-grain finish, black metal frame, central drawer, open shelf, and a side hook for hanging items. Its minimalist design is both functional and stylish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central drawer with a metallic handle, open shelf below, and the side hook on the right panel.
description_view_1: Top and rear view highlighting the spacious work surface and the supporting black metal frame beneath.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the open structure of the frame and the rear of the drawer and shelf.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the right vertical panel, side hook, and the open left side supported by a metal leg.
attribute_orientation: The side with the drawer and handle is intended to face the user, with the right panel and side hook on the user's right and the open left side supported by a metal leg.
